title: Press Release | UN Forum concludes with renewed commitment to accelerate action on the Sustainable Development Goals
content:
PRESS RELEASE UN Forum concludes with renewed commitment to accelerate action on the Sustainable Development Goals   NEW YORK, 15 July 2026–The High-level Political Forum on Sustainable Development (HLPF) concluded this week with the adoption of a ministerial declaration, signaling a renewed commitment by countries to deliver on the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). "With less than five years [...]

The post Press Release | UN Forum concludes with renewed commitment to accelerate action on the Sustainable Development Goals appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Breaking the silence: Zimbabwean youth leader calls for urgent investment in mental health
content:
For Tanatswa Amanda Chikaura, mental health advocacy began with a personal loss: while studying psychology at the University of Zimbabwe, she learned that a fellow student had died by suicide. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Breaking the silence: Zimbabwean youth leader calls for urgent investment in mental health appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: WHO warns DR Congo Ebola outbreak is outpacing response as Uganda reaches milestone
content:
The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has become the third largest on record and is spreading faster than any previous one during the first month of exposure, the head of the World Health Organization (WHO) warned on Thursday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post WHO warns DR Congo Ebola outbreak is outpacing response as Uganda reaches milestone appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Press Release | UN Secretary-General António Guterres announces Prime Minister of Spain as new Co-Chair of SDG Advocates group
content:
PRESS RELEASE UN Secretary-General António Guterres announces Prime Minister of Spain as new Co-Chair of SDG Advocates group NEW YORK, 15 July 2026–Amidst the growing number of development crises facing the world, United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres today announced Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez of Spain as Co-Chair of the Sustainable Development Goals Advocates group alongside [...]

title: SDG Media Zone at the 2026 HLPF
content:
The High-level Political Forum on Sustainable Development (HLPF) is the central United Nations platform for the follow-up and review of the implementation of the  Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) . On the sidelines of the Forum, the SDG Media Zone  is an opportunity for world leaders from all sectors to discuss, collaborate, and share innovative ideas for [...]

The post SDG Media Zone at the 2026 HLPF appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: World must move faster on Ebola response for DR Congo: UN relief chief
content:
The world must move faster to contain the spread of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), UN relief chief Tom Fletcher said on Thursday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post World must move faster on Ebola response for DR Congo: UN relief chief appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
